offer: For fleet operations supervisors managing 5–15 vehicles, inconsistent scheduling causes vehicle breakdowns. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inconsistent scheduling of preventative maintenance leads to vehicle breakdowns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for fleet operations supervisors
Share insights on Indie Hackers about scheduling issues
DM outreach to fleet operations supervisors with demo video
Engage in community forums for fleet management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for maintenance logs and simple dashboard for tracking maintenance history on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
